series_title: Procedures for Innovation Ohio Award Program
series_description: File contains coordinator''s handbook, employee suggestions, forms, correspondence.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Copies of records of persons who have been or are employees of the Public Utilities Section of the Attorney General's Office. Each folder contains: resumes/personnel actions/personnel requisitions/letters/recommendations/evaluations/resignations/etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office two years after termination of employment;

series_description: Files for individual cases involving appeals to the Ohio Supreme Court from orders of the Commission pursuant to Section 4903.13, Revised Code, and other cases in the Ohio Surpreme Court in which the Commission is a party or has an interest.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain minimum of two years after case closed for reference

series_description: Files for infividual cases before the Federal Communications Commission in which the Commission is a party or has an interest.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain a minimum of two years after case closed for reference

series_description: Memoranda and other communications between the Public Utilities Section and other sections of the Office of the Attorney General.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two years;

series_description: Files for individual cases involving administrative hearings before the Commission in which the Public Utilities Section of the Attorney General's Office participates as Counsel for the Commission's staff.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain minimum of two years after case closed for reference

series_description: Computer printout containing name, address, social security number, job classification PCN, pay range and related historical information on each Commission employee.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain permanently.

series_description: File containing all in-house records of adoption/childbirth leave requests which have been inactive for two years.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: File containing all in-house records of disability benefits claims which have been inactive for two years, claims for deceased employees, and medical information, where claim was not filed within two years.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office for 2 years ; Microform: Retain microfilm until superseded by updated microfiche

series_description: Files for individual cases before the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission in which the Commission is a party or has an interest.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain a minimum of two years after case closed for reference

series_description: Files for individual cases before the United States Civil Aeronautics Board, Department of Transportation, Securities and Exchange Commission and other Federal agencies in which the Commission is a party or has an interest.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain a minimum of two years after case closed for reference

series_description: Electronic database used to generate work schedules for staffing the PUCO hotline.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years

series_description: Regular and encrypted recordings of customer service transactions conducted over the phone. Recordings are submitted by utility companies and are used for auditing purposes.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain original until encrypted version is made

series_title: Ohio Statistics on Customer Accounts Receivables (OSCAR) Report
series_description: Monthly report detailing disconnection for non-payment and reconnection practices of Ohio''s investor-owned gas and electric utilities.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 5 years

series_description: File contains audit reports on field inspections of electric, gas, and telephone companies.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 5 years ; Paper: Retain 5 years

series_description: Electronic database containing case log and case file information. Case log information includes consumer''s area code and telephone prefix, city and county of residence, and text of record. Case file information contains detailed accounts of consumer contacts, providing such information as consumer name, address, date of inquiry, description of issue, follow-up with utility company (if necessary), and description of contact between staff and consumer. File traces contact from receipt to resolution. Note: Paper records of consumer letters pertaining to cases are also retained, if applicable.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years ; Paper: Retain for 3 months after case is closed

series_description: OAC/ORC codes pertaining to gas & pipeline safety.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded

series_description: Files containing Ohio service boundary maps of the following: local exchange telephone companies; electric companies & cooperatives; water & sewer systems.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until digitized ; Electronic: Retain until superseded

series_description: Electronic database that contains information pertaining to the investigative findings of the PUCO electric company field inspection staff. Information includes facilities inspections performed, and any instances of non-compliance with established standards.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years

series_description: Electronic database that contains information regarding the work activities of the PUCO telephone company field investigation staff. Information includes data pertaining to inspections performed, and any non-compliance with established standards. Annually submitted data related to the measurement of telephone service quality is also included.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_title: Commission Gas Pipeline Safety Case Information
series_description: Files and support data on Gas Pipeline Safety Case Stipulation Agreement filings and follow-up reports.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 5 years, or 2 years after stipulation agreement or order ends, whichever is longer

series_title: US DOT Grant Applications, Certifications, & Reimbursement Information
series_description: Documents and related information filed with US DOT related to their grant programs for Ohio''s Pipeline Safety Program.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 5 years

series_title: Gas Pipeline Safety 24 Hour Contact Reports
series_description: Annual reports from operator with the company emergency contact numbers.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded

series_description: Reports pertaining to utility company construction projects (1st, 2nd, and 3rd reports).
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years

series_description: Reports and information on probable violations found during inspections and follow-up inspections.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 5 years

series_description: 1) DOT Federal Reports 2) US DOT MIS data collection forms 3) Annual Important Additions Report 4) Annual Incident and Service Failures Report
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 5 years

series_title: Gas Pipeline Incident and Outage Reports
series_description: Telephonic notices; incident investigations & outage reports (related files & reports).
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 5 years

series_description: Operation & maintenance plan reviews; safety inspection audits; drug/alcohol headquarter audits; master meter audits; producer audits; construction audits.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 5 years

series_title: Compliance Reports for US DOT Regulations
series_description: Reports indicating gas and pipeline companies'' compliance with US Department of Transportation Pipeline Safety Regulations Part 190, 191, 192, 198, 199, and 40, which have been adopted by rule by the Commission.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded

series_description: Electronic database containing information gathered from field inspections of water/wastewater companies. Information collected includes statistical data pertaining to water distribution and wastewater collection. Database also houses information regarding water/wastewater company quarterly operational reports.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years

series_title: Gas Pipeline Service Quality Reporting System (GSQR)
series_description: Electronic database containing information submitted by gas pipeline companies regarding their service quality annual reports to the Commission (not the same as the utility company annual reports that contain financial information).
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years

series_description: Electronic database containing information pertaining to the daily activities of telephone company and electric company field inspection staff.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years

series_description: File contains Toll Traffic reports between contiguous exchanges when no extended area service has been established.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: File contains reports on field inspections of telephone company exchanges.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office 3 fiscal years or until the switching facility is reinvestigated

series_title: Compliance Reports for The National Electric Safety Code
series_description: Reports indicating electric companies'' compliance with federal safety standards, which have been adopted by rule by the Commission.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: File contains reports on field inspections of electric companies.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_description: File contains reports on field inspections of water/sewer companies.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 fiscal years

series_description: Random surveys given to customers of PUCO-regulated utilities to assess the effectiveness of services provided.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year

series_description: Electronic database containing information about problems found by field staff at electric companies, and when companies remediated the problem.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 5 years

series_title: One-time Submittals by Utilities to Fulfill OAC Requirements
series_description: File containing ESSS Rule 10 targets and related methodology; ESSS Rule 11 circuit-ranking criteria and related methodology, and Rule 27, maintenance programs.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years after staff accepts subsequent modifications ; Electronic: Retain 2 years after staff accepts subsequent modifications

series_title: Electric Service and Safety Standards Rule Reports
series_description: Recurring reports submitted by utilities to fulfill OAC requirements (e.g. ESSS rule reports). Performance data from the above recurring reports is also included.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Correspondence with utilities concerning OAC requirements and related compliance. Follow-up correspondence with utilities concerning their compliance with Commission orders. Agendas and notes of staff meetings to discuss compliance matters and waiver requests.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years ; Electronic: Retain 3 years

series_description: Internal reports and memos concerning staff review and analysis of utility submittals and reports required by the OAC (e.g. Reliability Analysis Plan materials); internal analysis, memos and emails related to utility customer service, service quality and consumer protection issues, which may or may not involve compliance with OAC requirements.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 2 years or until no longer needed

series_description: Staff''s work plans, schedules, assignments and project/activity status reports related to OAC submittals and reports. Also includes staff information requests to utilities and associated utility responses.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year ; Electronic: Retain 1 year

series_title: Weekly Reports and Internal Information File
series_description: Department weekly reports and reports from other areas; internal notifications of utility outages; internal information requests from the public affairs staff.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year

series_description: Responses to information requests from outside the Commission; enforcement letters/data request responses; company rule reporting - gas and electric utility statistics.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years ; Electronic: Retain 5 years

series_description: Electronic database that contains information pertaining to service quality of electric companies. Information focuses on electric distribution and transmission.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_description: Electronic database containing information submitted by companies that outlines and compares the cost of the gas they provide.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_description: Questionaires, speeches, reports and general information received from other departments or other agencies.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 calendar years

series_description: Employee activity reports and absence notifications (supervisor''s copy), employee personnel files (supervisor''s copy), training information.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 1 year after employee leaves ; Electronic: Retain for 1 year after employee leaves

series_description: Internal memos concerning staff attendance matters, leave balances reports and timesheets (employee copies), and expense reports (employee copy).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years ; Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_description: File containing non-stock orders, invoices and packing slips.
retention_statement: Paper: Image paper copy and quality check on imaging system. Retain until after audit ; Electronic: Retain imaged document a minimum of 4 years, even if audit occurs within 4 years

series_description: Electronic file containing the target points of department employees; used for the Target Recognition Award, a PUCO internal award recognizing employee performance.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 1 year

series_description: Training information and materials on department employees.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years ; Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_description: Information files containing speeches, reports, questionaires, complaint letters and general information from other departments or agencies.
retention_statement: Paper: Unless otherwise defined by statute, retain 3 years

series_title: Federal and Ohio Disaster Services Memoranda
series_description: Memoranda issued from both the Federal and Ohio Disaster Services entities.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Manual containing emergency contact information for all regulated utilities operating in Ohio.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Files containing personnel performance records, copies of certificates, disciplinary information.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until employee is no longer employed or moves to another area

series_title: Customer Service Formal and Informal Complaints
series_description: File contains investigation reports on utility complaints lodged with the Commission.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until end of fiscal year in which complaint is resolved

series_description: Contains enforcement information, collected by internal and external staff, regarding telephone and electric service standards. Used for compliance purposes.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 5 years

series_description: Correspondence with companies, the general public, and state legislators regarding complaints against regulated utility companies. File also includes general information, questionaires and data requests.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_description: Statements showing intrastate gross earnings for railroads and public utilities and amounts apportioned among and assessed upon such companies for uses and purposes designated in Section 4905.10, Revised Code.
retention_statement: Paper: Permanently maintained and updated.

series_description: File of expense reports and vouchers used by employees claiming reimbursement for expenditures for State of Ohio related business; source documents.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 fiscal years and current year or until audited, whichever is later ; Electronic: Retain 4 fiscal years and current year or until audited, whichever is later

series_description: Listings of checks issued each day.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 fiscal years and current year ; Electronic: Retain 4 fiscal years and current year

series_title: Report of Lost, Stolen, or Damaged Property Form
series_description: Form annually submitted to DAS and lists the lost, stolen or damaged property for that year.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Form submitted to State Salvage listing all items that are being sent.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: List of current equipment valued at over $1,000.00, or items that are deemed sensitive.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: File contains reports used in budget analysis and documentation; budget proposals, allotment process, and other related documents and correspondence are also included.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years after the end of the biennium

series_description: Electronic database that contains emergency contact information for all utility companies that are regulated by the Commission.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: File contains subfile for each federal agency that the PUCO receives grants from, with pertinent information regarding each program.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 4 years & current year or until audit, whichever is later

series_description: Reports from State Auditor regarding audit of agency financial and management operations. Also includes correspondence pertaining to the audits.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 3 audit cycles

series_title: Cross-Index of Companies and Case Numbers
series_description: An alphabetical list of companies and case numbers associated with them.
retention_statement: Microform: Retain permanently.

series_description: Electronic listing of all activities of cases as they are in progress.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until system is determined obsolete

series_description: Journals containing all entries and orders signed by the Commissioners and Attorney Examiners. Series includes Formal Journals, Motor Carrier Permit Journals, Motor Carrier Certificate Journals, and Rate Journals.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until transferred to microfilm and microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness ; Electronic: Retain until system is determined obsolete ; Microform: Retain permanently. Copy sent to State .
disposition: Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Other ; Microform: Permanent Archives

series_description: Original documents of filings, entries, orders and all papers, maps and documents pertaining to each individual case.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until system is determined obsolete ; Microform: Retain permanently. ; Paper: Retain until scanned and image is checked for quality and completeness
disposition: Electronic: Other ; Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper

series_title: Sequential Numbering Index of All Cases
series_description: Electronic index used for assigning case numbers to new cases filed.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded

series_description: Includes information regarding cases and the Commission case code system, filing requirements, and the rules and regulations of the PUCO.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Electronic list of daily filings docketed in the formal case files.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until all records transferred to electronic format ; Microform: Retain permanently. ; Electronic: Retain until system is determined obsolete
disposition: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Permanent ; Electronic: Delete

series_description: A form that is used internally to track departmental records sent to offsite storage.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_title: Confidential Documents From Formal Case Files
series_description: Filings from the formal docketed case files that are given protective treatment pursuant to Ohio Administrative Code 4901-1-24. Examples of documents involved include testimonies, exhibits, financial statements, cost studies, reports, and other items containing proprietary or sensitive information regarding utility company facilities and operations.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in status until 18 months after Motion for Protective Order is granted, or until designated period expires, whichever is greater

series_description: Cases involving appeals to the Ohio Supreme Court from orders of the Commission pursuant to Section 4903.13, Revised Code, and other cases in the Ohio Supreme Court in which the Commission is a party.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until system is determined obsolete ; Microform: Retain permanently.

series_description: The official PUCO/Ohio Railroad Commission Annual Reports from 1867 to the present. Reports contain summaries of all transactions and proceedings for each fiscal year, as well as official acts of the Commission, policies, functions, operations, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Paper: Retain 1 copy permanently. Transfer 1 copy to the State . Destroy excess copies when no longer of administrative value.

series_description: Contains biograhical data on past Commissioners, photos and information regarding terms served. Also contains PUCO historical information, timelines, and miscellaneous photos of Commission employees and events.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain permanently.

series_description: Annual reports containing financial statements of utility companies.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year ; Electronic: Retain until system is determined obsolete ; Microform: Retain permanently.
disposition: Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Other ; Microform: Permanent

series_description: Forms detailing bus and/or commercial vehicle carrier compliance with federal motor carrier safety regulations.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: File containing completed audit package, copy of authority, results of audit, summary of audit, and a record of compliance of carriers operating under the authority of the PUCO.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audit is completed

series_description: File containing pamphlets and reports from the US DOT, BMCS, etc. Items outline changes in and additions to the federal regulations established by these agencies. Reference material.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: File containing correspondence relating to complaints against motor carriers and bus companies.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: File containing documentation and information used in creating employment tests for new hires.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years after position filled or decision not to fill the position is made

series_description: Copies of all correspondence, memos, and other documents pertaining to departmental involvement in changes in Commission rules, and federal motor carrier safety and hazardous materials rules. Also includes any changes in state or federal statutes.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office until pertinent regulation or statute is superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Copies of all correspondence, forms, and supporting documents for federal MCSAP grant program and for department''s hazardous materials grant program.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 5 fiscal years.

series_description: Copies of weekly and quarterly reports prepared by the Director for the Chairman. Provides a review of all departmental activities. Weekly reports are kept in electronic format. Quarterly reports are kept in both paper and electronic formats.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years ; Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_description: File containing correspondence pertaining to procedures, complaints, and inquiries to/from motor carriers, attorneys, other agencies, etc. Used for reference purposes.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years

series_title: Photos from Inspections and Compliance Reviews
series_description: Photographs taken during roadside inspections, hazmat incidents, and compliance reviews. Stored on computer disk.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 7 years

series_title: Hazardous Materials History List and Renewal Report
series_description: Files containing the registration history of hazardous materials carriers as well as licenses renewed each year.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain while active; destroy 5 years after expiration, revocation, or denial.

series_title: Certified Mail Receipts and Returned Mail
series_description: File of certified mail receipts and mail that has been returned because the Post Office was unable to deliver it (recipient moved, recipient did not claim the certified mail, etc.).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and image is checked for quality and completeness ; Electronic: Retain 5 years

series_description: Summaries of conferences conducted with trucking companies regarding violations discovered during inspections.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 5 years

series_description: Includes internal procedures and instructions to field investigators.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Monthly report documenting the activities of the PUCO Enforcement Division field staff.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: Electronic tracking system of motor carriers that had compliance reviews and safety audits performed. Also monitors safety operations. Includes case number, field investigator, completion and upload dates.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Lists all equipment and uniform items issued to field staff.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_title: New Entrant Safety Audits and MCS 150 Forms
series_description: Paper copies of safety audits monitoring motor carriers'' safety operations and all supporting documents. Paper copies of MCS-150 forms used to reclassify motor carrier operations.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: Electronic database that contains information pertaining to the activities of the Commission field staff; employees log what they do using this system.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 5 years

series_description: Electronic database that contains information pertaining to the operational/safety audits of trucking companies. Audits are conducted by the PUCO field staff, and information is submitted to the Commission via this system.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 5 years

series_description: File containing reports of investigations of property damage, train accidents, and notifications from railroads concerning derailments and crossing accidents.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office for 2 years; store at storage facility for 5 years

series_description: File containing: journal of applications for lateral and vertical substandard clearances, investigation reports, and original copy of Commission Order approving substandard clearances.
retention_statement: Microform: Permanently maintained and updated in microfiche format.

series_description: File containing recorded complaints from the public relating to hazardous situations and service; used for historical and legal reference.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: File containing original notices from the PUCO to railroads for correction of unsafe conditions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: File containing maps of railroad systems in Ohio.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded

series_description: File containing annual bridge safety inspection reports filed by railroads.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: File of Brotherhood closed cases containing type of complaint, reports of investigators, and supplemental correspondence relating to case file. Used for legal reference and review.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: File containing materials pertinent to railroad grade crossing improvement projects.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office for 2 years; store at storage facility for 5 years

series_description: Comprehensive database of records pertaining to railroad crossings in Ohio. Information includes incidents (accidents), inspections, projects and complaints.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain data until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Letters from the legislators and letters in answer concerning their constituents.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for one General Assembly

series_description: Includes legislative language amendments, fiscal requests from the Governor''s Office, Legislature, Office of Budget & Management, Legislative Services Commission.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 2 budget cycles or until no longer of value to the agency

series_description: Electronic record documenting the status of on-going projects and issues; advises Governor''s Office of various events and issues.
retention_statement: Electronic: Keep for 1 General Assembly or until no longer of value to the agency

series_description: Electronic record documenting the status of on-going projects and issues; advises Governor''s Office of various communication events and issues.
retention_statement: Electronic: Keep for 1 year or until no longer of value to the agency

series_description: Statements from the Joint Legislative Ethics Committee (JLEC Statements).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Recordings of PUCO Commission meetings that reside on the PUCO internet for access and download by the public.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 2 weeks

series_description: Kept electronically. Digital photo files and images. Photos taken to document PUCO public and employee events.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until no longer current or deemed of no interest

series_description: Daily compilation of electronic news articles documenting issues of interest to the PUCO; advises supervisors of various events and issues.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_description: Received from consultants bidding on the management performance audits.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded

series_description: Monthly, semi-annual and annual ER form filings; electric fuel component case files, including: annual summary reports, 30-day filings, M/P audit reports, financial audit reports, company and intervener testimonies, Opinion and Orders, monthly FERC form filings. File also includes additional fuel-related information as needed.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office 3 years, transfer to storage facility for 5 years

series_title: Unit Cost Records and Depreciation Information
series_description: File containing unit cost records providing prices of utility property and equipment in different years, and depreciation information for use in depreciation studies of the utility companies.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office until superseded

series_description: File containing Securities and Exchange Commission security registration filings, 10K and annual reports to shareholders, memos to the Commission, recommended entries, working papers and other supporting documents relating to public utility security issuance authorizations.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: File contains actual investigation analysis papers, worksheets and summary sheets.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office until subsequent case is closed

series_description: File contains material related to formal rate cases. Documents consist of: 1) Opinion and Orders. 2) Related staff testimony and working papers.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain documents and reports for 10 years after case is closed Retain working papers and testimony until case is completed or closed

series_description: File of PUCO statistical reports containing financial and operational data applicable to Ohio public utilities.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years

series_description: Annual reports containing financial statements of utility companies filed with the PUCO, Federal Energy Regulatory Commission, and Federal Communications Commission. OFFICIAL COPY MAINTAINED PERMANENTLY IN DOCKETING.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_title: Gas Cost Recovery Public File by Company
series_description: Public files that contain information pertaining to the purchased gas of gas utility companies. Files are organized by company.
retention_statement: Microform: Retain until determined obsolete ; Paper: Retain in office 2 years, transfer to storage facility for 10 years

series_description: File containing information that pertains to Commission gas cost recovery rulemaking cases. Included are both specific rulemaking cases as well as generic case files.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_title: Gas Cost Recovery Audit Case Files
series_description: Files that contain information regarding the gas cost recovery audits performed on regulated gas companies.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office 2 years, transfer to storage facility for 10 years

series_description: Gas utility regional report to the PUCO. Also includes reports filed by major gas companies for 5-10 year natural gas forecasts.
retention_statement: Microform: Retain permanently. ; Paper: Retain until scanned and image has been checked for quality and completeness ; Electronic: Retain until system is determined obsolete
disposition: Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Other

series_description: Electronic database containing information that is used to generate utility company boundary maps.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Electronic database that contains financial information submitted by utility companies (gas). Information is used to generate companies'' annual reports of intrastate revenue.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Documents developed internally or received from outside sources which support staff findings, conclusions and recommendations.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Written requests for information received from the public, other utility commissions, or from telecommunications-knowledgeable individuals or firms.

series_description: Monthly Power Plant (EIA-759); Monthly Report for Cost and Quality of Fuels for Electric Plants (FERC form# 423); Monthly Report of Electric Energy, Capacity and Peak (EIA-119M); Monthly Historical Energy Data (SE-1).

series_description: Actual consumption and related data (SG-1).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years

series_description: Monthly report of petroleum products sold into states for consumption (EIA-782C).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years

series_title: Energy Reports, Engineering Data, Project Records
series_description: File of energy reports containing supply and demand figures.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded

series_description: File contains the following: statistical reports containing financial and operational data applicable to Ohio public utilities; staff independent forecasts of 5-10-20 year trends in energy consumption by fuel type and by sector.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 10 years

series_description: Electric utility regional report to the PUCO. Also includes reports filed by major electric companies for 5-10-20 year electric forecasts.
retention_statement: Microform: Retain permanently. ; Paper: Retain until scanned and image has been checked for quality and completeness ; Electronic: Retain until system is determined obsolete
disposition: Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Other

series_description: Electronic database that contains pricing information submitted by the utility companies on a monthly basis.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Electronic database containing information that is used to generate market projection (forecasting) reports for the various utility industries.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: File containing power plant performance measuring for Ohio electric company generating plants; quarterly data.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 10 years

series_description: File contains survey responses that were received from boiler owners. The survey was conducted by the Ohio Bio-Mass Energy program from September 1989 to April 1990.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 20 years after survey is complete

series_description: Routine correspondence pertaining to day-to-day activities of the office. Includes internal correspondence (letters, memos, speeches, reports, questionnaires, meeting notes, complaints, etc.), correspondence from various individuals, companies, and organizations requesting information pertaining to agency and legal interpretations; requests for routine information or publications provided to the public by an agency which are answered by standard form letters, and other miscellaneous inquiries. This correspondence is informative (it does not attempt to influence agency policy).
retention_statement: Electronic: Unless otherwise defined by statute, retain 3 years

series_description: File contains all executive orders received from the Governor''s Office, and procedural directives.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: File containing policy resolutions adopted and signed by the Commission.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain permanently.

series_description: Commissioners and Schedule C employees filing financial disclosure statements and RC 102.04(D).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Log of hearing room schedules for each case before the Commission; gives the hearing case number, day, time and room for each hearing. Used for avoiding conflict in scheduling hearing rooms, and as a reference source.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office 1 calendar year

series_description: File of orders on the policies, decisions, operations, etc. of the PUCO from 1921 to the present.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain permanently.

series_description: Printed or recorded copies of public speeches given by the Chairman of the PUCO.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value. State will review for possible transfer. Destroy if no historical interest to State Archives. ; Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value. State Archives will review for possible transfer. Destroy if no historical interest to State Archives.

series_description: Correspondence the Chairman of the PUCO has responded to from consumers, state officials or utility CEOs regarding utility matters.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded or Chairman leaves office

series_title: Weekly Communications Reports to the Governor
series_description: Reports include information regarding departmental activity and cases before the Commission.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years

series_description: Miscellaneous documents, reports and meeting notes from internal staff as well as from various utility companies and other external sources.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded or until Chairman leaves office

series_description: File containing insurance papers of motor carriers, which includes the following: liability insurance limits, cargo insurance limits, cancellations, and surety bonds.
retention_statement: Paper: Paper copy to be destroyed after image is checked for quality and completeness. ; Electronic: Maintain as long as registration is active. Once it has expired, keep for 5 years

series_description: New application of registration, withdrawn applications, amendments, revocations, reinstatements, suspensions, statements of tax paid, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced ; Electronic: Maintain for 5 years

series_description: File containing a copy of the Refund Requisition (ADM-3209) indicating that a refund has been made, the amount of such refund, and the reason(s) for making the refund.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by State Auditor and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: File containing a copy of the remittance to General Revenue, a copy of backup detail in the form of application copies, and postings indicating the dollar amounts paid into the General Fund and the reasons for doing so. File also contains deposit numbers, dates, amounts and breakdown of those amounts as well as transfers, refunds and details of completed transactions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by State Auditor and audit report is released

series_description: File of letters detailing deficiencies in intrastate unified carrier registration and hazardous materials registration applications.
retention_statement: Paper: Paper copy to be destroyed after image is indexed and checked for quality and completeness. ; Electronic: Maintain for 5 years

series_description: File of affidavits giving permit agencies permission to sign forms for applicants.
retention_statement: Paper: Paper copy to be destroyed after image is indexed and checked for quality and completeness ; Electronic: Maintain for 5 years

series_title: Unified Carrier Registration, Intrastate Tax and Hazardous Materials Registration Files
series_description: File of completed registrations recording name, address, registration numbers and description of motor carrier operations (type of operation, number of vehicles, fee paid).
retention_statement: Paper: Paper copy to be destroyed after image is indexed and checked for quality and completeness. ; Electronic: Maintain for 5 years

series_description: Copies of hazardous materials inspections and supporting documentation. Copies of compliance reviews and supporting documentation (may include copies of NIF/NAV letters, requests for conferences, correspondence to/from respondents, settlement agreements.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years ; Electronic: Retain 5 years after case is closed and no further appeals can be filed

series_description: Electronic database containing information that pertains to the Certificates of Authority of PUCO-regulated companies. Information includes name of company, address, type of authority granted, date of issuance and current status.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until system is determined obsolete

series_description: Electronic listing of regulated utilities and the corresponding tariff numbers assigned. Used to generate new tariff numbers as needed.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded

series_description: File contains tariffs for telecommunications, electric, gas, water, sewer, pipeline and steam heating. Information includes: rate schedules, terms and conditions of service.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded

series_description: File contains tariffs and time schedules for household goods carriers and ferryboat lines. Information includes: classification of freight, rate and time schedules, rules and regulations applying to such tariffs, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded

series_description: Miscellaneous documents, reports and meeting notes from internal staff as well as from various utility companies and other external sources.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded or Commissioner leaves office

series_description: Copy of the roadside safety inspection report that the carrier signs and returns stating that all violations have been corrected.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and image has been checked for quality and completeness ; Electronic: Retain 5 years

series_description: Form detailing results/findings of safety inspections conducted on buses and/or commercial vehicles. Part of the Federal Motor Carrier Safety Assistance Program (MCSAP).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years ; Electronic: Retain 5 years

series_description: Quarterly and annual status reports during the term of their self-insured status.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: Computer database system containing all active and inactive motor carriers showing name, address, authority numbers and authority for both interstate and intrastate carriers. This file automatically assigns authority numbers to the new carriers. This file also maintains records of stamp and decal payments, status of insurance and contracts, Unified Carrier Registrations, and Alliance for Uniform Hazardous Materials Procedures.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain data until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Files containing official minutes from Commission meetings, Power Siting Board meetings, and meetings of Nominating Council activities.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_title: State Job Specifications and Position Description Files
series_description: A set of files containing descriptions of each position within the Commission.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, replaced or obsolete

series_description: File recording the flow of applications and hiring processes for new employees and the flow of promotions and transfers for persons already employed. Used to determine the utilization of minorities and females in each EEOC job category within the Commission.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Forms submitted by agency staff seeking monetary reimbursement or time release for tuition or educational opportunities.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years and

series_description: List of document types in this record series include, but are not limited to: Accident or Illness form, American with Disabilities Act (ADA), C+84, C86, C-9, Childbirth/Adoption, DHO/SHO Orders, Disability Application, Doctor Letter for Light Duty, Family and Medical Leave Act (FMLA) documents, Hospitalization/Outpatient Surgery Certification, Independent Medical Exam (IME), Injury/Illness Report (ADM 4303), Medco-14s, Medical correspondence, Medical Records, Ohio Employee Assistance Program (EAP) Agreements, Retirement Disability Application, Return to Work, Salary Continuation Request/Extension, Statement of Psychiatric Disability-Psych Questionnaire (ADM 4316), Transitional Work Program (TWP), Workers' Compensation correspondence, letters from BWC, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: If a paper version of a record exist, scan and retain the record electronically ; Electronic: Retain 7 years from effective date of employee separation. ; Microform: Transfer to electronic version and destroy.
disposition: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Other

series_description: Report containing cumulative number of FMLA hours used by employees.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded by updated information

series_description: Files of employee grievances against the Commission.
retention_statement: Paper: If a paper version of a record exist, scan and retain the record electronically ; Electronic: Retain 7 years after case is closed, or for the life of the contract

series_title: Vacation, Sick, and Overtime Printout Report
series_description: Monthly electronic report of each employee''s used and available vacation, sick leave, and overtime.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded

series_description: Report used to maintain information regarding all persons employed during a given calendar year (e.g. taxes withheld, PERS total withheld, and other payroll deductions). Microfiche received from DAS.
retention_statement: Paper: If a paper version of a record exists, scan and retain the record electronically ; Electronic: Retain 3 years

series_description: File of wage and tax statements containing information concerning employee earnings and tax withholdings (Form W-2, Department of Treasury, IRS).
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced ; Paper: If a paper version of a record exist, scan and retain the record electronically

series_description: File containing documents on minorities and women to ensure agency is in compliance with federal and state laws.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 3 years

series_description: File containing reports documenting the status of minorities and women by classification, and analyses of data received from employees who are exiting the agency. These reports are submitted to the Ohio Civil Rights Commission.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office 3 years

series_description: Ohio Civil Rights Commission and EEO Office documents containing complaints and hearing information for compliance purposes; quarterly computer printout listing each commission employee by department, classification, race and sex; reports documenting the status of minorities and women by classification, and analyses of data received from employees who are exiting the agency.
retention_statement: Paper: If a paper version of a record exist, scan and retain the record electronically ; Electronic: Retain 7 years

series_description: Civil Service Application, Computer/Network Access, Disability Separation Agreement, Drug Testing Acknowledgement, electronic or paper evaluations, Exit Checklist, Fraud Hotline Acknowledgement (HV66), Human Trafficking Acknowledgement, Letters/Correspondence (HR related), Licensure, Certifications, Military Leave forms, New Hire/Orientation/Policy Acknowledgements, OAKS ID form, Retirement forms, Outside Employment, Poll Workers forms, Position Descriptions (Employee file), Pre-Employment packet, Prior Service Form & Information, Promotion/HQ Change/Changes in Position Acknowledgement, Reference Checks, Resume/CV, Cover Letter, Security Access form, Separation/Acceptance letters, Statement Concerning Your Employment Not Covered by Social Security, Supplemental Employment Agreement, Supplemental Nepotism Statement (ADM 4173), Training/Education documents, Unclassified Services Explanation & Acknowledgement, Unemployment Compensation, electronic or paper Personnel Actions.
retention_statement: Paper: If a paper version of a record exists, scan and retain the record electronically ; Electronic: Retain 7 years from effective date of employee separation.

series_description: Electronic form stating employee receipt of Commission policies.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Requests for outside agency (Highway Patrol, EOD, Auditor, etc.) to investigate an employee. Includes request, referral, and any attached documentation including preliminary investigation before the referral.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years after completion of investigation

series_description: Contains internal investigation documents related to possible disciplinary action cases.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years after completion of investigation

series_description: Contains information about training courses employees have taken. Feeds off of Employee Information Database.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Contains information regarding employee disciplinary actions, including the date, the offense, and the type of discipline administered.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years from effective date unless an agreement has been established and no other discipline imposed during the last 3 years.

series_description: Contains information regarding job postings, including posting date, job number, successful candidate, date records are sent to long-term storage, and box number.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Documents pertaining to public records requests, including but not limited to the original request, correspondence between staff and requestor or other staff, redacted and unredacted responsive records. Maintained to document compliance with public records law obligations (
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years ; Electronic: Retain 3 years

series_description: Retain for thirteen months, then destroy.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for thirteen months

series_description: Online comparison charts of electric and natural gas supplier offers, which include prices, contract terms, cancellation fees and promotional offer details. The Apples to Apples comparison charts are electronically updated daily.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 5 years

series_description: Provisional medical certifications for applicants to determine if applicant meets the program qualifications. Files may include applicant’s personal information, medical history, driving records, physician reports, driver’s license numbers, social security numbers, applicant’s work history and related correspondence.
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain for two years after inactive date (withdrawn)

series_description: Electronic file for all posted jobs containing authorization to post materials, applications, screening records, tests and/or interviews, and corresponding assessment files, and records of decisions. List of document types in this record series are not exhaustive.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain current year and three additional years from date of hire or decision not to fill the position is made

series_description: Records in this series include, but are not limited to, Inactive Discipline, Investigation documents, Memorandum of Understanding (MOU), Pattern Abuse notices, other agreements, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: If a paper version of a record exists, scan and retain the record electronically ; Electronic: Retain 7 years from effective date of employee separation.

series_description: Audio/video recordings of hearings
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until transcript of hearing is created, or no longer of administrative value

series_description: Memoranda containing requests for legal advice by the Commission and responses thereto by the Public Utilities Section of the Attorney General's Office. These files contain communications that are priveleged under the attorney-client relationship.
retention_statement: Paper: Continually maintained (used by attorneys as a continuing legal reference source).

series_description: Files containing agreements and certificates between Ohio and various states which allow for reciprocity in registration by motor vehicles as provided for by Section 4905.36, Revised Code, and correspondence relating thereto.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office as long as agreement is in force;

series_description: Files for individual cases before the Interstate Commerce Commission in which the Commission is a party or has an interest.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain a minimum of two years after case closed for reference

series_description: Copies of payroll records of employees of the Public Utilities Section of the Attorney General's Office including: time sheets/absenteeism record/compensatory time (earned and used)/etc. The originals are kept in data center of Commission.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two years;

series_description: Files for individual cases in Federal and state trial and appellate courts in which the Commission is a party or has an interest.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain a minimum of two years after case closed for reference

series_description: Files for individual cases before the United States Supreme Court in which the Commission is a party or has an interest.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain minimum of two years after case closed for reference
